events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need parse scenario. Residential electrical data/comm & security. Observed field condition: bend radius violations. Work rough-complete. Component condition categories may apply: installed-defective. Need identify component or condition and visible defect cues. Decision fail because non-compliant. Risk? Bend radius violations in low-voltage cabling can cause signal degradation, future failures, not life safety. Medium maybe. Work stage rough-complete. component_conditions installed-defective, non-compliant. percent_complete maybe 70. value irrelevant 0. confidence high 0.95. findings: cable bends exceed minimum bend radius, kinking/flattening of cable, possible tie-wraps pulling cable too tight. actions: re-route/rework cables to maintain manufacturer/TIA bend radius, replace damaged cables, secure with appropriate supports. rationale: TIA-568 and NEC 800 require communications cables not be bent beyond specified radius; violations degrade performance and damage cable. references: TIA-568, NEC 800. Need ensure JSON valid.
